title: pittosporum lacrymasepalum
intro: Pittosporum lacrymasepalum, a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae, is native to the Pacific Islands and is also known as the "tear drop tree" due to its unique, droplet-shaped fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pittosporum lacrymasepalum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
